label: Evidence Types
description: Canonical classification of source evidence artifacts accepted by ICICSO Evidence Intelligence.
usageNotes: Use `code` as the stable persisted value in ingestion, validation, APIs and UI filters.
Use `id` for ontology-internal references and migration-safe joins.
`family` groups semantically similar artifacts for scoring and governance, not for display.

entries.label: Guideline
entries.description: Formal clinical practice guideline issued by a recognized authority with explicit recommendations.
usageNotes: Default authoritative source for executable recommendations when jurisdiction fits.

entries.label: Consensus Statement
entries.description: Consensus-based recommendation document with structured expert agreement.
usageNotes: Use when formal guideline status is absent but governance is explicit.

entries.label: Position Paper
entries.description: Professional society or institutional position framing preferred clinical practice.
usageNotes: More policy-like than trial-derived; usually requires local review before execution.

entries.label: Appropriate Use Criteria
entries.description: Criteria for judging when an intervention is appropriate in specific scenarios.
usageNotes: Commonly transformed into decision rules and eligibility logic.

entries.label: Pathway
entries.description: Operational care pathway such as ERAS or integrated perioperative workflows.
usageNotes: Execution-oriented source linking evidence to operational sequencing.

entries.label: Protocol
entries.description: Clinical protocol specifying how care should be delivered within an organization or network.
usageNotes: Strongly operational and often institution-specific.

entries.label: Order Set
entries.description: Predefined executable order collection for a clinical scenario.
usageNotes: Use as implementation artifact, not as scientific source by itself.

entries.label: Checklist
entries.description: Checklist used to enforce compliance with critical clinical or surgical steps.
usageNotes: Implementation artifact with compliance relevance.

entries.label: Randomized Controlled Trial
entries.description: Randomized controlled trial optimized for internal validity.
usageNotes: Usually requires synthesis or contextualization before EO generation.

entries.label: Pragmatic Trial
entries.description: Trial optimized for external validity and real-world delivery.
usageNotes: May carry stronger implementation relevance than explanatory RCTs.

entries.label: Cohort Study
entries.description: Longitudinal observational study following exposed and unexposed populations.
usageNotes: Useful for prognosis, harms and long-term comparative signals.

entries.label: Case-Control Study
entries.description: Observational study comparing patients with and without an outcome.
usageNotes: Frequently used for rare outcomes and harm detection.

entries.label: Cross-sectional Study
entries.description: Observational snapshot of exposure and outcome at one point in time.
usageNotes: Use for prevalence or association, not causal execution.

entries.label: Systematic Review
entries.description: Structured synthesis of studies using explicit inclusion and appraisal methods.
usageNotes: Use when pooled estimates are not appropriate or not available.

entries.label: Meta-analysis
entries.description: Quantitative pooled synthesis of comparable studies.
usageNotes: Prefer over single studies for effect size aggregation when heterogeneity is acceptable.

entries.label: Network Meta-analysis
entries.description: Comparative synthesis including direct and indirect treatment contrasts.
usageNotes: Requires directness review before executable transformation.

entries.label: Registry
entries.description: Structured registry evidence capturing routine-practice patients and outcomes.
usageNotes: Keep distinct from generic RWE when registry governance matters.

entries.label: Real World Evidence
entries.description: Real-world evidence derived from routine care data outside formal registries.
usageNotes: Broader than registry evidence; often more heterogeneous.

entries.label: Health Technology Assessment
entries.description: Technology assessment integrating effectiveness, safety, adoption and system impact.
usageNotes: Important for jurisdiction and resource relevance.

entries.label: Cost Effectiveness
entries.description: Economic evaluation comparing health outcomes relative to cost.
usageNotes: Use for operational prioritization, not direct clinical truth inversion.

entries.label: Budget Impact
entries.description: Economic model estimating near-term financial impact of adoption.
usageNotes: Resource governance input; never sole clinical determinant.

entries.label: Editorial
entries.description: Editorial commentary without formal evidence synthesis requirements.
usageNotes: Context-only; not directly executable.

entries.label: Narrative Review
entries.description: Non-systematic review summarizing a field without formal search methodology.
usageNotes: Useful for framing and vocabulary, not binding execution.

entries.label: Expert Opinion
entries.description: Opinion or recommendation grounded primarily in expert judgment.
usageNotes: Allowed as gap-filler under explicit governance only.

entries.label: Preclinical
entries.description: Bench, animal or mechanistic evidence not directly validated in patient care.
usageNotes: Never directly executable in EO without translational bridge and governance.

entries.label: Biomarker Study
entries.description: Study evaluating biomarker performance, predictive value or stratification capacity.
usageNotes: Map to diagnosis, severity or eligibility functions depending use case.

entries.label: Omics Study
entries.description: Study based on genomic, transcriptomic, proteomic or related omics data.
usageNotes: Requires strong applicability and assay standardization checks.

entries.label: Diagnostic Accuracy Study
entries.description: Study estimating sensitivity, specificity or related diagnostic performance metrics.
usageNotes: Primary source for diagnosis and screening functions.

entries.label: Prognostic Study
entries.description: Study estimating future outcome risk based on baseline variables or models.
usageNotes: Primary source for risk stratification, surveillance and escalation logic.
